summary: Label-Designer Integration Testing Complete - All features verified: Template selection dropdown in LabelPrintModal, templates loaded from backend API, Standard-Layout option always available, preview changes with template selection, Test-drucken button in Label-Designer works.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

critical_code_review_comments: PrintableLabel.jsx correctly fetches templates from GET /api/label-templates on modal open
Template dropdown shows 'Standard-Layout' as default option plus all saved templates
LabelPreview component correctly renders template-based preview with dynamic elements
printAssetLabelWithTemplate() function properly handles both default layout and custom templates
LabelDesigner.jsx has working 'Test drucken' button in preview dialog (line 905-918)
All 10 element types available in designer: QR-Code, Barcode, Asset-ID, Seriennummer, Gerätetyp, Hersteller, Modell, Eigener Text, Logo, Trennlinie
context_for_next_testing_agent: Label-Designer integration tested. Template selection works in LabelPrintModal (Assets tab -> printer icon). Label-Designer accessible under Lagerverwaltung -> Label-Designer. Test print button available in preview dialog. Sessions expire quickly - login at start of each test.

LabelPrintModal_template_dropdown.details: Template-Auswahl dropdown shows in modal with Label-Template label

standard_layout_always_available.details: Standard-Layout option always shown as first option in dropdown

preview_changes_with_template.details: LabelPreview component receives template prop and renders accordingly

test_print_in_label_designer.location: Lagerverwaltung -> Label-Designer -> Vorschau -> Test drucken button

GET /api/label-templates.response: Returns templates array with 3 templates including default
